description: Package-level external tools for iocraft-builder (Rust/napi-rs native module)

rust.description: Rust toolchain (required for napi-rs native module compilation)
rust.notes: Installed via rustup for consistent version management. Requires stable channel.

cargo.description: Rust package manager and build tool
cargo.notes: Bundled with Rust toolchain via rustup.

napi-cli.description: napi-rs CLI for Node.js native addon building
napi-cli.notes: Optional - cargo build works directly with napi-rs crate.
